[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]
- Type: Time (Minutes)

- Description: São Jorge 81% bar repackaging — direction, provenance decisions & review
  
  Pull requests (GitHub evidence):
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/agroverse_shop_beta/pull/180
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/agroverse-inventory/pull/17
  
  Details:
  Repackaged 1.649 kg "Cacao Almonds KG - Organic" (Gary Teh, offchain) into 25 x 50 g 81% dark chocolate bars + 229 x 1 g cacao tea, sourced from Fazenda Sao Jorge cacao (Coopercabruca, Itajuipe BA), ledger-grouped under AGL4.
  
  Work performed:
  - Created new Agroverse SKU organic-81-dark-chocolate-bar-50g-fazenda-sao-jorge-bahia-2024 (SKUs tab + products.js, $10, Shipment=AGL4).
  - Built new PDP with Sao Jorge/Coopercabruca provenance + taste profile; cross-listed on the farm page, a new "Products from Coopercabruca" section, and the homepage #products grid.
  - Regenerated facebook_product_feed.xml and sitemap.xml.
  - Submitted the [REPACKAGING BATCH EVENT] (composition e963c8ff) and applied the [REPACKAGING SETTLEMENT EVENT]: offchain transactions -1.649 almonds / +25 bars / +229 tea; Currencies metadata + SKU; store-inventory.json published (25 bars in stock).
  - Diagnosed + fixed the repackaging settlement GAS handler (processPostRepackagingCleanup_): it scanned the wrong column/tag and never processed production settlements. Now scans col G for [REPACKAGING SETTLEMENT EVENT], dedups via col R marker, and writes a structured audit row to a new "Repackaging Settlement" ops tab. Deployed to production (@8).
